args.name: files
args.description: Files or directories to archive or extract

name: -c
--create
options.description: Create a new archive

name: -x
--extract
options.description: Extract files from an archive

name: -t
--list
options.description: List the contents of an archive

name: -f
--file
options.description: Use archive file or device ARCHIVE

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Verbosely list files processed

name: -z
--gzip
options.description: Filter the archive through gzip

name: -j
--bzip2
options.description: Filter the archive through bzip2

name: -J
--xz
options.description: Filter the archive through xz

name: --zstd
options.description: Filter the archive through zstd

name: -C
--directory
options.description: Change to DIRECTORY before performing operations

name: --exclude
options.description: Exclude files matching PATTERN

name: -k
--keep-old-files
options.description: Do not overwrite existing files when extracting

name: --strip-components
options.description: Strip NUMBER leading components from file names

name: -p
--preserve-permissions
options.description: Extract information about file permissions

name: --same-owner
options.description: Try extracting files with the same ownership

name: -h
--dereference
options.description: Follow symlinks; archive and dump the files they point to

name: --no-same-owner
options.description: Do not try to preserve ownership when extracting

name: -a
--auto-compress
options.description: Use archive suffix to determine the compression program

name: --delete
options.description: Delete from the archive

name: --totals
options.description: Print total bytes after processing the archive

name: -W
--verify
options.description: Attempt to verify the archive after writing it
